summary: Completed comprehensive end-to-end testing of Kalakriti Admin Panel. All backend APIs (28/28) and frontend features tested successfully. Admin authentication, dashboard stats, orders management, Shiprocket serviceability check, mediums CRUD, gallery, testimonials, content/CMS, coupons, settings, analytics, and public API endpoints all working correctly.
passed_tests: Backend: Health check endpoint
Backend: Admin login with admin@kalakriti.in / Kalakriti@2026
Backend: Admin /me endpoint
Backend: Dashboard stats (7 orders, ₹8,775 revenue MTD, 3 pending shipments)
Backend: Analytics endpoints (revenue timeseries, orders by status, orders by medium)
Backend: Mediums CRUD - list, get, update (4 mediums found: Watercolour, Pencil Sketch, Oil on Canvas, Charcoal)
Backend: Orders CRUD - list, get, update notes, serviceability check (7 orders)
Backend: Gallery CRUD - list, update (4 items)
Backend: Testimonials CRUD - list (1 testimonial: Priya Krishnamurthy)
Backend: Content/CMS - get homepage content
Backend: Coupons CRUD - list (WELCOME10 coupon found)
Backend: Settings - get settings (pickup pincode 201301)
Backend: Public API - mediums, gallery, testimonials, homepage, site-settings
Backend: Public API - pricing calculation with watercolour, A3, 2 faces, rush
Backend: Public API - coupon validation with WELCOME10 code
Backend: Auth protection - 401 without JWT token
Frontend: Login flow with correct credentials
Frontend: Dashboard page with stats cards (Today's Orders: 2, Revenue Today: ₹8,775, Revenue MTD: ₹8,775, Pending Shipments: 3)
Frontend: Dashboard revenue chart (last 30 days)
Frontend: Dashboard orders by medium pie chart (charcoal, oil-on-canvas, pencil-sketch, watercolour)
Frontend: Dashboard recent orders table

Frontend: Order detail - status timeline (NEW, PAYMENT_RECEIVED)
Frontend: Order detail - internal notes textarea and save button
Frontend: Order detail - status change dropdown
Frontend: Order detail - reference photos with lightbox
Frontend: Shiprocket serviceability check - button click opens modal

Frontend: Medium editor - Save button and active toggle

Frontend: Content/CMS - hero title, subtitle, eyebrow, CTAs editable
